title: Garlicky Creamy Mexican Chicken Enchilada Casserole
description: A comforting, creamy, and spicy Mexican casserole dish made with tender chicken, melted cheese, and crunchy parma ham.

ingredients.name: Canned diced tomatoes with green chilies

instructions: Cook chicken in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Add garlic to skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine cooked chicken mixture, diced tomatoes, and parma ham.
In a separate bowl, mix softened cream cheese and Mexican crema until smooth. Set aside.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spread a thin layer of cream cheese mixture onto the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 tortillas on the bottom of the dish, overlapping them slightly.
Spread half of the chicken mixture over the tortillas, followed by half of the cheese and half of the remaining tortillas.
Repeat the layers, starting with the remaining tortillas, then the remaining chicken mixture and finally the remaining cheese.
Top with shredded cheese and bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
